profile.name: Vera Sakhno
profile.role: QA Engineer / Test Analyst / Quality Specialist
profile.summary: Experienced in functional testing of web and mobile applications, requirements analysis, and identifying risks and gaps. Skilled in defining testing strategies aligned with project objectives. I support teams in delivering products with a predictable level of quality and take a practical, thoughtful approach to testing.

project: Analyze requirements, business logic, user flows and designs
Perform functional, regression, smoke and exploratory testing
Test web and mobile applications
Perform API testing (REST / GraphQL) and database testing (MySQL)
Track and document defects
Create and maintain test documentation
Test third-party integrations
Analyze logs using CLI and Graylog
Collaborate with product managers, developers, analysts and designers
internal: Mentor interns and onboard new team members

project: Contributed to launch of 10+ multilingual projects (teams of 5–25)
Defined and formalized testing approaches per project
Updated and implemented UI automation using Selenium WebDriver
Maintained and extended third-party mocks using Mockoon
internal: Created Magento onboarding guide reducing onboarding time from ~100h to ~10h
Designed and implemented QA onboarding processes

project: Test Telegram bot migration to web platform
Perform functional and UI testing
Evaluate usability and UX
Prepare bug reports and improvement recommendations
Participate in service component design
Refined incomplete user scenarios improving feature delivery
Created comprehensive service test model including API and entity relationships
Perform functional and UI testing
Validate implementation against design mockups
Define user scenarios for multiple roles
Collaborate with product owner and developers
Helped define MVP requirements and priorities
Identified critical defects in matching logic
Created structured test checklist and system-level test report

projects: Personal Account Portal for Utility Service Providers

project: Test backend-focused service
Prepare bug reports and perform re-testing
Collaborate directly with developers
Identified requirement gaps balancing compliance and usability
Ensured stable release without critical issues
Register and classify support requests
Resolve standard issues
Escalate complex requests
Monitor SLA compliance
Reduced third-line escalations by more than 50%
Created and maintained support knowledge base
Onboarded new support specialists

education.degree: Bachelor's degree in Industrial and Civil Engineering

preferences.restrictions: Not considering gambling or betting projects

about: Passionate about software testing and understanding system design. I connect requirements, implementation and real user experience. Extensive experience in e-commerce and early-stage startups. Value honesty and accuracy in both work and life.
